state.next-action: PHASE 22 SESSION 2: expansion. Phase 22 pivoted from apps/portfolio/content/docs to a self-contained Next.js site at vendor/get-anything-done/site/ that deploys to Vercel from the GAD repo (Root Directory: site). First ship (22-01→22-05, 22-07, 22-10) is live: hero, workflow mermaid, rounds, projects, results, playable archive (iframe fix pending verification), requirements lineage, catalog (24 skills/21 agents/60 commands), templates. Per-run SSG pages work with the divergence callout for v5-style process-vs-reality splits. Session 2 scope: 22-11 git-history for v1/v2 REQUIREMENTS.md snapshots; 22-12 markdown rendering in prebuild via `marked`; 22-13/14/15 per-item detail pages (/skills/[id], /agents/[id], /commands/[id]); 22-16 findings routes (/findings, /findings/[slug]); 22-17 framework vs inherited catalog split; 22-18 site's own planning state as /planning meta-transparency page; 22-19 skills/portfolio-sync/SKILL.md so future agents maintain the site automatically. All tracked as individual atomic commits per GAD-18.
